{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303382740C6B4D5175399FA1A36"}"},"total":4692},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7174402696429028096","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，主角不暧昧不圣母，描写女性也不恶心，没有女配莫名其妙喜欢主角啥的，系统运用得也挺好，这就是我想看的男频文，就是更新太慢，快点更新吧！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670420854,"group_id":"7162090412109204512","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzD//vvpIYWA9pN4GYyYFJTck3NJhsTzcINNThqVT6aD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2670040935049774","user_name":"度度厄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2670040935049774","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770964749,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7162090412109204512","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统】+【合成】+【稳健】+【老六】
已改编漫剧，点击正文右下角观看
穿越仙界，还好激活无限合成系统。
“师兄，秘境开启，一起去吧？”
林远：“不，我要闭关。”
“师弟，此去坊市，你要小心谨慎，准备一点东西。”
林远：“好的，我会准备亿点点。”
“长老，妖王快杀过来了！我们快跑吧。”
林远：“什么境界？”
“金丹后期啊！长老快走吧。”
林远不慌不忙地看了一眼自己脑袋里的元婴，沉思该怎么打才能合理一点。
别名《开局合成悟道茶，稳健不出》《无限合成，悄悄惊艳所有人》
